description:
Search C# symbols (classes, methods, properties, fields, ...) across the workspace by name using Roslyn. Fuzzy/camel-hump matching is supported (e.g. 'ACECSO' can match 'AudioCueEventChannelSO'). Faster and more precise than grep for locating a declaration by name when you do not know its file.

Returns matching symbols with kind, containing type, file path and line number. Use code_find_references / code_goto_definition afterwards for deeper navigation.

The C# analysis server warms up on first use; if the tool reports it is still preparing, retry after a moment.

query.description: Symbol name or fragment to search for (case-insensitive, fuzzy).

max_results.description: Maximum number of symbols to return. Default 50.
